overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through a historic frontier town with wooden buildings and dirt streets. The character passes by an undertaker's shop and general store before entering a narrow alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier town main street with wooden boardwalk buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dirt street alongside weathered wooden frontier buildings

entered.detail: two-story wooden frontier buildings with balconies and railings lining the left side of the street
grassy area with sparse vegetation on the right side of the dirt road
small wooden outbuilding with a sloped roof in the distance on the right
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt street in a Western frontier town, with weathered wooden buildings featuring balconies on the left and open grassy areas on the right. The scene is quiet and empty, with strong midday shadows cast across the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier town street passing undertaker establishment

events.description: horse with rider trots past from left to right in front of the character

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the undertaker's building while a horse rider passes by

notable_agents.action: horse with rider trotting past from left to right along the street

entered.detail: red brick building with green trim and 'CAMPBELL UNDERTAKER' signage featuring an arched doorway
small weathered wooden shack with a sloped roof beyond the undertaker building

segments.scene_description: The character passes the Campbell Undertaker building with its distinctive red facade and arched entrance. A horse and rider trot past from left to right, adding movement to the otherwise quiet frontier street.

scene_state.functional_zone: general merchandise store front with wooden wagon

events.description: character begins turning left toward the narrow alley beside the general merchandise store

agents.ego_description: approaching the general merchandise store and preparing to turn into the narrow alleyway beside it

entered.detail: wooden frontier store with covered porch and 'GENERAL MERCHANDISE' signage, green shutters
large wooden wagon with supplies parked in front of the general store

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the General Merchandise store with its covered wooden porch and parked supply wagon. The character then begins turning left toward a narrow passage between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between wooden buildings leading to gated door

events.description: character enters narrow enclosed alleyway between weathered wooden building walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway toward a wooden gate at the end

entered.detail: weathered wooden wall of the general store forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
red wooden wall with green shutters forming the right boundary of the alley
closed wooden plank door with metal hinges at the end of the alleyway
wooden barrel with metal bands sitting against the right wall of the alley

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed alleyway between tall wooden building walls, leaving the open street behind. The alley contains a wooden barrel and leads to a closed wooden gate at the far end, with diffused lighting creating deeper shadows in the confined space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit frontier town that gradually transitions from an open main street into a confined, shadowed alleyway. It begins with the character walking along a dirt road lined with weathered wooden buildings and balconies under the harsh light of midday. As the character passes the red facade of the Campbell Undertaker building, a horse and rider trot across the path, adding a brief moment of motion to the quiet street. The scene then shifts toward a General Merchandise store with its covered porch and supply wagon before the camera turns left, leaving the open expanse behind. Finally, the view enters a narrow enclosed alleyway where the bright sunlight gives way to diffused lighting and deep shadows, leading toward a closed wooden gate.
